title: Copper Hopper Texture Fix
description: Fix for the texture issue in the Copper Hopper mod
body:
This resource pack fixes the texture issue in the [Copper Hopper Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/copper-hopper).

[Link to issue in question](https://github.com/pcal43/copper-hopper/issues/97)

Despite the claims of Copper Hopper's developer, this issue is still not fixed as the bottom of the texture is a jukebox, which looks very strange. This resource pack fixes that.

Without resource pack:
![Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7621923faa5a0327e4f05c4eb9bfb61ef57ceea.png)

With resource pack:
![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/808325a7203d8e6d02e6ff0153dd8a36fe8d94a9.png)
